title: Cloud Operations Analyst
description: monday.com is seeking a Cloud Operations Analyst to support our cloud infrastructure, optimize system performance, and ensure high availability for our work management platform used by thousands of enterprises. You will monitor cloud resources, implement automation, and partner with engineering teams on scaling initiatives.
responsibilities: Monitor cloud infrastructure and systems for performance and availability
Implement infrastructure automation and infrastructure-as-code solutions
Troubleshoot cloud platform issues and coordinate with vendors
Optimize cloud costs and resource utilization
Document operational procedures and create runbooks
Support incident response and participate in on-call rotation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
certifications: AWS Solutions Architect or equivalent cloud certification preferred

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Unlimited PTO and flexible work hours
Professional development budget and team growth opportunities
